title: Wicken's Better Textures/Models
description: Changes textures/models to both vanilla and modded blocks
body:
What is in the Pack?

![New Utility Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c41df522849c1c56ea6aa18902c6d0ea041733a7.png) A lot of Utility Blocks have been changed with an updated look. ![New Crops](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c20b12f5b3c9a82013a78b5eb520747afcdcd86a_0.webp) Crops are now 3D for a better look. Villagers have also been updated. ![New Cows](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/980e131109128f016d9659a5147cd71ee27c936a.png) ![New Skeletons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9b865b8b28b13d2aacd5515b36ece6b6bb98972.png) Animals and mobs have also been updated. Often with multiple varients. ![New Swords](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4fc62d56803003427954e6df211baf470316c526_0.webp) ![New Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8021343bf91d6e2183c8ec817200fb6e1749bf7b_0.webp) Most if not all weapons and tools have been updated. This includes modded items as well. ![New Ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/babd512e0f268b2e867ae24477fbaec01dc2e6a4_0.webp) ![New Ores 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3022e311921d2d35b262ed0cff404abc24cc0854_0.webp) Ores have been updated to be more 3D and similar to the item.

  ***

About The Resource Pack

[Curseforge Resource Pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/wickens-better-textures-models) I have been playing minecraft since the beginning and some of the models just need to be improved. So I decided to remodel/retexture alot of vanilla and modded items. A full list of the things that have changed is down below.   Optifine or EMF/ETF is required. Shaders are highly recommended. You don't need the mods below for this to work. You can use this for vanilla minecraft.   If you want me to do something just comment ***

The minecarts still have some issues with them. This is an issue with EMF/ETF. Once they fix the bug I will update the minecarts.

***

Q&A

Q: Are you going to update the resource pack to 1.21.5?

A: As of now, No. Maybe in the future. Updating to the newest version will cause issues with the varients of the new mobs.

Q: Why have you suddenly stop updating?

A: I have ADHD, so I am currently focused on this. Once I move on to something else I will probably stop updating till I come back to minecraft.

Q: What Versions and Mods are you testing on?

Game Version: 1.21.1

ModLoader: Neoforge-21.1.134

Mods: Sodium, EMF, ETF, Iris Shaders, and mods from list above.

Shaders: Solas Shader

Q: Are you going to fix the transparency to blocks like the furnace?

A: Unfortunately I cannot. It has something to do with the games code and cannot be changed.

***

About Me

As with most people, I started playing minecraft really early into its livespan. I think the first version I played was 1.6. I have a background in 3d modeling, coding, and procedural texturing. I don't have that much experience in texturing animals so the textures might not be the best. I also have ADHD which means this is my current thing I am focusing on. Once I move on to something else, I will most likely stop updating this til I come back to minecraft.
